titleStmt.title: SII 40.8: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 8. (A.R. No. B. 430 of 1929.) Velukūru, Chittoor Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On the south wall of the deserted Īśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1486, Raktākshi, Pushya ba. 10, corresponding to 1564 A.D., December 28, Thursday.

Records the gift of land for providing food offerings and conducting worship to the god Mārgasahāyadēva in the temples of Trimūrtīśvaradēva and Mādhavanārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ of Vēḷukūru by Pratāparāyalu, son of Śri-Bhanūji Voḍayalu of Durvā-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī man mahāmaṁḍalēśvara rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāyaluṁgāru prithvirājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śālivāhana śaka
va¨rṣaṁbulu 1486 Agunēṭi raktākṣi saṁvatsara puṣya ba 10 lu du¨rvā gōtra pavitrālayina śrī
¨rma mahārājādhirāja rā śrī bhānujīvoḍayala komāruṁḍu pratāparāyaluṁgāru
vēḷukūri tirumū¨rttīśvara dēvunikinni mādhavanārāyaṇa perumāḷakunu rātri saṁdhi naivēdyānakuṁgānu
māku dhāravōsi Iccina bhūdāna
rāyalu manaku Amaranāyaṁkarāna tiruvēṁgaḷa nalūru Anē grāma
nadi tīramaṁdu mā¨rgasahāyadēvuni saṁnidhini bhānuji voḍayala gāri
lenani sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpū¨rvakamugānu Istiṁ ganaka Ī grāmanaku kaṭina yella vitunnu
nani saṁkramaṇa puṇyakālamaṁddu
nu voḍayala
nuḍuloṁdenaiṁci Utsava puṇyamuna daivamu
yistimi Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu naḍavaṁga
nu dānātrye pālanaṁ dānātsva¨rgamavāpnōti pāla
paradattānupālanaṁ svadattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu .
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhi¨rvaṣasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi
Digital edition of SII 40.8 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
